founderRequirement: Create a handmade kids activity kit business for Instagram and WhatsApp validation in India
nextActions: Publish and track leads for 7 days.
projectTitle: Create A Handmade Kids Activity Kit
risks: Demand may be overestimated without live competitor and customer checks.
Manual fulfillment can break if order tracking is not updated daily.
Creative may need iteration before paid ads make sense.

channels: Google Form or manual lead sheet
firstSevenDays: Day 1: publish problem/promise post and collect interest.
Day 2: publish product explanation and DM warm leads.
Day 3: post proof, pricing, and limited launch slot.
Day 4: collect objections and update FAQ.
Day 5: run small manual outreach batch.
Day 7: decide continue, change offer, or stop.

product.offer: Create A Handmade Kids Activity Kit

pricingStrategy.launchRule: Start with an introductory price only if margin remains positive after packaging and shipping.

manualSteps: Create Instagram post/story assets from creative section.
Publish with a clear comment/DM call to action.
Track every lead in the lead tracker template.
Use WhatsApp for confirmation and payment instructions.

assumptions: Market truth must be verified manually before scaling ads.
The first version should avoid paid infrastructure dependencies.
competitorChecks: Search Instagram reels/posts for similar offers and note price bands.
Check Amazon/Meesho/Etsy listings for commodity pressure.
Record at least 10 competitor hooks, prices, and review complaints.
research.summary: Validate demand for: Create a handmade kids activity kit business for Instagram and WhatsApp validation in India
targetCustomerHypotheses: Buyers already searching for a fast, low-risk solution.
Instagram and WhatsApp-first customers who need proof before purchase.

killCriteria: No qualified enquiries after 7 focused days.
Customers only want a price below viable margin.
successMetrics: 1 paid order or clear preorder intent
